title: Hyro's PSWG Additions & Compatibility
description: a Star Wars themed Minecraft datapack / mod weaving lightsaber forms into PSWG through Better Combat's elegant combat system, and lots more incoming...
body:
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4b22c1c9f0d4afa24dfa1dcd7cebdc850b6e098.png)

# Hyro's PSWG Additions & Compatibility

A datapack that enhances your Star Wars experience in Minecraft by adding iconic lightsaber combat mechanics and kyber crystal features.

# ![download-badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?labelColor=black&color=grey&label=&suffix=%20downloads&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/hyros-pswg-additions-compatibility&style=flat&logo=data:image/png;base64,)

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4b22c1c9f0d4afa24dfa1dcd7cebdc850b6e098.png)

## ✨ Features

### ⚔️ Lightsaber Combat Forms
Master five distinct fighting styles, each with unique animations and combat patterns:

* **Form I: Shii-Cho**
  - The foundation of lightsaber combat
  - Focuses on disarming techniques
  
* **Form II: Makashi**
  - Elegant and precise movements
  - Specialized for lightsaber dueling
  
* **Form III: Soresu**
  - Ultimate defensive stance
  - Perfect for deflection and endurance
  
* **Form IV: Ataru**
  - Acrobatic and aggressive
  - Emphasizes mobility and quick strikes
  
* **Form VII: Juyo**
  - Ferocious and unpredictable
  - Ideal for double-bladed combat
 
### 💎 Kyber Crystal System
Each crystal holds unique properties and lore:

* **Standard Crystals**
  - Blue: Mark of the Jedi Guardian
  - Green: Mark of the Jedi Consular
  - Purple: Symbol of Balance
  - Yellow: Sign of the Sentinel
  - White: Pure Force Alignment
  - Red: Mark of the Sith

* **Rare Crystals**
  - Orange: Mark of the Sentinel
  - Bronze: Ancient Republic Legacy
  - Silver: Path of the Gray
  - Cyan: Mark of the Sage
  - Magenta: Sign of the Mystic
  - Teal: Peacekeeper's Crystal

* **Installation**
  - Make sure to use Form II: Makashi style on your lightsaber
  - Hold your lightsaber in main hand
  - Place crystal in off-hand
  - Sneak to initiate the attunement process

### 💎 Crystal Bleeding System
Corrupt your kyber crystal through a dark side ritual, transforming your blade into a menacing crimson red. Experience a dramatic transformation process with custom effects and animations.

### ⛏️ Crystal Mining
- Get the crystal extractor tool (`/function pswg:tools/give_extractor`)
- Find amethyst clusters in geodes
- Mine the cluster in 3 stages with the extractor
- Get a random kyber crystal with different rarities:
  * Common (85%): Blue, Green, Purple, Yellow, Broken
  * Rare (15%): Orange, Bronze, Silver, Cyan, Magenta, Teal

### ⌨️ Controls
- Press `J` to open the Player Menu (configurable in controls)

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4b22c1c9f0d4afa24dfa1dcd7cebdc850b6e098.png)

## 🎮 Quick Start

**Commands:**
```
/function pswg:display_menu            - Access Combat Forms menu with a lightsaber in hand
/function pswg:start_bleeding          - Begin Crystal Bleeding ritual with a lightsaber in hand
/function pswg:crystal/give/<color>    - Give a Kyber Crystal 
/function pswg:crystal/give/all        - Give all the Kyber Crystals
/function pswg:tools/give_extractor    - Give the extractor tool to mine kyber crystals from amethyst clusters
```

## 📋 Requirements

- 🌌 [PSWG (Parzi's Star Wars: Galaxy) - 1.20.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/pswg)
- ⚔️ [Better Combat - 1.20.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4b22c1c9f0d4afa24dfa1dcd7cebdc850b6e098.png)

## 🔮 Coming Soon

- Kyber crystal gathering system
- Force powers
- Additional combat forms
- More Star Wars environments _(Structures on Tatooine, New Planets, etc...)_
